title: Mondays are the best
summary: Early mornings are the best. When it's still dark outside, when Slack is quiet, when the house is still, a thick feeling of brilliance and superiority fills the air. Mondays are the early mornings of the week. Everything is full of potential. The todo list is aspirational. Nothing
content:
Early mornings are the best. When it's still dark outside, when Slack is quiet, when the house is still, a thick feeling of brilliance and superiority fills the air.

Mondays are the early mornings of the week.

Everything is full of potential. The todo list is aspirational. Nothing has gone off the rails yet.

The Monday Americano stirs dreams of greatness, of productivity, of transcendence.

Full eyes, full mug, can't lose.

Mondays are the best.
